title: Corpus chunk metadata profile for Knowledge Graph ETL
description: Every TextChunk node in Neo4j should be loadable from a JSONL row that satisfies these fields. Use ird_corpus_lib.normalize_chunk_for_kg() before export when aliases are missing.

kg_materialized_fields.source: effective_start_date (non-empty string) or explicit override on the record
kg_materialized_fields.notes: Roadmap / Lex Specialis naming; empty manifest dates become null.

kg_materialized_fields.source: first section_ref, else last pdf_outline_breadcrumb segment
kg_materialized_fields.notes: Optional; null when no heuristic signal.
